body: implementation complete. 4 LOW findings from review-spec-2026-05-12-v2.md surfaced for PR description: (1) AC-03 exit-code reading (a) — dry-run only follows new rule; non-dry-run keeps existing canonicalise contract (zero on success). (2) AC-05 registry shape implemented as (entity_type, structural_path) -> Disposition; action is the lookup value, not a key dimension. (3) AC-05 .orbit/archive/ treated as offline research input — walker scans live .orbit/ only. (4) Sidecar writes go through atomic.rs::write_atomic, ordered sidecar-first then canonical file so a crash between writes leaves quarantined content recoverable. 13 new reconcile unit tests + 3 inner FIELDS lockstep tests + 1 disposition demo end-to-end. Total 187 tests passing (was 171).
